routineVariablesEditor.title: Variables
routineVariablesEditor.detected_hint: Detected from {{name}} placeholders in the routine instructions.

scheduleEditor.title: Schedule
scheduleEditor.cron_hint: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

pathInstructionsModal.title: How to get a full path

steps.1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
steps.3: Hold the Option key and choose "Copy as Pathname".

mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, press Enter, then run pwd.

steps.1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
steps.2: Click in the address bar at the top and copy the full path.

windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

steps.1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
steps.2: Run pwd to print the full path.
steps.3: Copy the output and paste it here.

linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

reportsToPicker.saved_missing: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.

agentConfigForm.prompt_template_placeholder: You are agent {{ agent.name }}. Your role is {{ agent.role }}...
agentConfigForm.prompt_template_warning_short: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Keep it compact and dynamic to avoid recurring token cost and cache churn.
agentConfigForm.prompt_template_warning: Prompt template is replayed on every heartbeat. Prefer small task framing and variables like context.* or run.*; avoid repeating stable instructions here.
agentConfigForm.codex_minimal_warning: Codex may reject `minimal` thinking when search is enabled.
agentConfigForm.no_hermes_model_detected: No Hermes model detected yet. Configure Hermes or enter a provider/model manually.

help.name: Display name for this agent.
help.title: Job title shown in the org chart.
help.role: Organizational role. Determines position and capabilities.
help.reports_to: The agent this one reports to in the org hierarchy.
help.capabilities: Describes what this agent can do. Used in the org chart and task routing.
help.adapter_type: How this agent runs: local CLI (Claude/Codex/OpenCode), OpenClaw Gateway, spawned process, or HTTP webhook.
help.cwd: Deprecated legacy working-directory fallback for local adapters. New configs should use project workspaces.
help.prompt_template: Sent on every heartbeat. Keep it small and dynamic. Use for current-task framing, not large static instructions.
help.model: Override the default model used by the adapter.
help.thinking_effort: Control model reasoning depth. Supported values vary by adapter/model.
help.chrome: Enable Claude Chrome integration by passing --chrome.
help.skip_permissions: Run unattended by auto-approving adapter permission prompts when supported.
help.bypass_sandbox: Run Codex without sandbox restrictions. Required for filesystem/network access.
help.search: Enable Codex web search during runs.
help.workspace_strategy: How Paperclip should realize an execution workspace for this agent.
help.workspace_base_ref: Base git ref used when creating a worktree branch.
help.worktree_parent_dir: Directory where derived worktrees should be created.
help.max_turns_per_run: Maximum number of agentic turns (tool calls) per heartbeat run.
help.command: The command to execute (e.g. node, python).
help.local_command: Override the CLI command path the adapter should call.
help.extra_args: Extra CLI arguments for local adapters, comma-separated.
help.env_vars: Environment variables injected into the adapter process.
help.bootstrap_prompt: Only sent when Paperclip starts a fresh session.
help.payload_template_json: Optional JSON merged into remote adapter request payloads.
help.webhook_url: The URL that receives POST requests when the agent is invoked.
help.heartbeat_interval: Run this agent automatically on an interval.
help.timeout_sec: Maximum seconds a run can take before termination.
help.grace_sec: Seconds to wait after interrupt before force-kill.
help.wake_on_demand: Allow this agent to wake by assignments, API calls, UI actions, or automation.
help.cooldown_sec: Minimum seconds between consecutive heartbeat runs.
help.max_concurrent_runs: Maximum number of heartbeat runs that can execute simultaneously.
help.budget_monthly_cents: Monthly spend limit in cents. 0 means no limit.

messages.codex_auth_config: Codex is authenticated via its own auth configuration.
messages.openai_key_present: OPENAI_API_KEY is set for Codex authentication.
messages.openai_key_missing: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set. Codex runs may fail until authentication is configured.

hints.set_openai_key_or_auth: Set OPENAI_API_KEY in adapter env, shell environment, or run `codex auth` to log in.
hints.use_codex_cli_probe: Use the `codex` CLI command to run the automatic login and installation probe.
hints.retry_probe: Retry the probe. If this persists, verify Codex can run `Respond with hello` from this directory manually.
hints.try_probe_manually: Try the probe manually (`codex exec --json -` then prompt: Respond with hello) to inspect full output.
hints.configure_openai_or_login: Configure OPENAI_API_KEY in adapter env/shell or run `codex login`, then retry the probe.
hints.run_codex_exec_debug: Run `codex exec --json -` manually in this working directory and prompt `Respond with hello` to debug.

errors.opencode_model_required: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.

routines.title: Routines
routines.delivery_hint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.
routines.routine_created_body: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routines.no_routines_hint: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.
routines.select_company: Select a company to view routines.
routines.description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.
routines.define_work_hint: Define the recurring work first. Trigger setup comes next on the detail page.
routines.post_creation_hint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup for schedules, webhooks, or internal runs.
routines.update_failed_body: Paperclip could not update the routine.
routines.run_failed_body: Paperclip could not start the routine run.

concurrency_descriptions.coalesce: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrency_descriptions.always: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrency_descriptions.skip: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catch_up_descriptions.skip: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catch_up_descriptions.capped: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

routineDetail.secret_warning: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.
routineDetail.trigger_saved_body: The routine cadence update was saved.

signing_descriptions.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signing_descriptions.hmac_sha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.

projectWorkspace.not_found: Workspace not found for this project.

runs.noTranscript: No persisted transcript for this run.

keys.created: API key created — copy it now, it will not be shown again.

budgets_section.title: Budget control plane
budgets_section.description: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.

active_incidents.label: Active incidents
active_incidents.subtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings

pending_approvals.label: Pending approvals
pending_approvals.subtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action

budgets_section.active_incidents_description: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.

scope_description.agent: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
scope_description.project: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.

budgets_section.empty: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.

inference_ledger.title: Inference ledger
inference_ledger.description: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
inference_ledger.utilization: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.

finance_ledger.title: Finance ledger
finance_ledger.description: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
finance_ledger.net_description: Debit minus credit for the selected period
finance_ledger.estimated_description: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative

by_agent.title: By agent
by_agent.description: What each agent consumed in the selected period.

by_project.title: By project
by_project.description: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.

by_biller.title: By biller
by_biller.description: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.

providers.empty: No cost events in this period.

billers.empty: No billable events in this period.

finance_timeline.title: Recent financial events
finance_timeline.description: Top-ups, fees, credits, commitments, and other non-request charges.
finance_timeline.empty: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

finance_kind.title: Financial event mix
finance_kind.description: Account-level charges grouped by event kind.
finance_kind.empty: No finance events in this period.

companies.title: Companies
companies.select_to_manage: Select a company to manage its settings.

general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.

censor_username.title: Censor username in logs
censor_username.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

keyboard_shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboard_shortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.

feedback_sharing.title: AI feedback sharing
feedback_sharing.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedback_sharing.no_default: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedback_sharing.not_allowed_description: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
feedback_sharing.dev_note: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.confirm_disable_all: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
heartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

errors.disable_many: Failed to disable {{failed}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

enable_isolated_workspaces.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
enable_isolated_workspaces.description: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.

auto_restart_dev_server.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
auto_restart_dev_server.description: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.

plugins.title: Plugin Manager
plugins.install_description: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.

alpha.title: Plugins are alpha.
alpha.description: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.

plugins.no_examples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
plugins.install_to_extend: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
plugins.uninstall_confirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

company_settings.title: Company Settings
company_settings.company_name_hint: The display name for your company.
company_settings.description_hint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
company_settings.logo_hint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
company_settings.brand_color_hint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
company_settings.require_approval: Require board approval for new hires
company_settings.require_approval_hint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
company_settings.allow_sharing: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
company_settings.allow_sharing_hint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
company_settings.feedback_terms_info: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
company_settings.invite_snippet_hint: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
company_settings.packages_info: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
company_settings.archive_info: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
company_settings.archive_confirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
company_settings.no_company: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

archiveError.title: Archive failed
archiveError.body: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox

interruptSuccess.title: Run interrupted
interruptSuccess.body: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.

interruptError.title: Interrupt failed
interruptError.body: Unable to interrupt the active run

feedbackSuccess.savingPromptShare: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
feedbackSuccess.savingPromptLocal: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local

documents.title: Documents

error.invalidKeyPattern: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.

documents.historicalPreviewDescription: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
documents.outOfDateDescription: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.

errorMessage.requiredKeyAndBody: Document key and body are required
errorMessage.conflictFetchFailed: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
errorMessage.saveBeforeViewHistory: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.

pathInstructionsModal.title: How to get a full path

steps.1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
steps.3: Hold the Option key and choose "Copy as Pathname".

mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, press Enter, then run pwd.

steps.1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
steps.2: Click in the address bar at the top and copy the full path.

windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

steps.1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
steps.2: Run pwd to print the full path.
steps.3: Copy the output and paste it here.

linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

company.title: Name your company
company.description: This is the organization your agents will work for.
company.mission_placeholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

agent.title: Create your first agent
agent.description: Choose how this agent will run tasks.
agent.name: Agent name
agent.adapter_environment_check_description: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.

task.title: Give it something to do
task.description: Give your agent a small task to start with - a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
task.description_placeholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...
task.default_title: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
task.default_description:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work

launch.title: Ready to launch
launch.description: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.
